payload.answer: The request is too broad to save as a durable personal memory. Please choose a narrower, specific AI-related fact, preference, project, or goal to remember.
repair_options: Save a specific AI preference, e.g. “I prefer concise explanations of AI concepts.”
Save a specific AI project, e.g. “I am working on an AI chatbot for customer support.”
Save a specific learning goal, e.g. “I want to learn about transformer architectures.”
Save a specific tool preference, e.g. “I use Python and PyTorch for AI experiments.”
Do not save anything for now.
